title: Cobblemon Grass Classic PC
description: Replaces Cobblemon PC background with a classic Pokémon grass one
body:
**Replaces Cobblemon PC background with a classic Pokémon grass one**

- PC without texture package - PC sin el paquete de textura

![PC1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85dbe42b8dd0d4d4177867487cdb42f6a88a2535.png)
![separador](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a2168af4659b32fbf01c8e8c0c563bf228b0643.png)
- PC with texture package - PC con el paquete de textura

![PC2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d68df4993e9ef5eed19bf5ff7551186db358d8b.png)
